name: peg
desc: a single glossy polished glass marble sphere, deep amber and honey tones, strong specular highlight, top-down centered on solid black background

name: board
desc: a seamless polished dark walnut wood surface texture, warm rich grain, soft sheen, top-down

name: hole
desc: a small round recessed empty socket carved into polished wood, soft inner shadow, centered on solid black background

name: glow
desc: a soft radial golden light burst, warm glowing halo, centered on solid black background
